prompt: Vertical 4:5 photoreal studio portrait. Stylish man in a three‑quarter back pose turning his head over his left shoulder toward camera, slight smirk. Short textured dark hair with volume, neat full beard and mustache. Rectangular amber‑tinted sunglasses with brown frames. Wardrobe: oversized cream/ivory chunky‑knit sweater with vertical forest-green stripes and a few bold red stripes on sleeve and body; ribbed cuffs and hem; light beige trousers. Seamless bold red backdrop with a vignette/gradient; strong key light from camera‑left creating a crisp side shadow of the subject on the background to camera‑right; soft rim on hair and shoulder; warm skin tones, detailed knit texture. Mid‑torso framing, left arm slightly forward, simple dark ring on hand. High contrast, minimal grain, clean studio look, no text.
